case_title: ANDERSON, RONALD et al VS JOHNSON JOSEPH H DBA SIR RICHARD`S USED CARS III et al

docket_entries.description: PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ANDERSON, RONALD ANDERSON LANA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SIR RICHARD'S USED CARS $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $94.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,094.00, DISMISSED AS TO JOSEPH JOHNSON, INDIVIDUALLY. CORRECT DEFT IS SIR RICHARD'S USED CARS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT SIR RICHARD'S USED CARS
